Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 1}-san... I did it. I managed to speak my mind for once![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}And I stood up to Mr. Takenozuka... An actual adult man![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Um, thank you for all your help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}You like to mess with people, don't you, {f 4 1}-san?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}But I don't mind because it's you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I said I wanted to overcome my fear of men, but at the same time, all I was doing was depending on you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I wanted to change, and yet it was always someone else who fought my battles...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}But this time, I was able to do something all on my own![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 0 25 25}I finally managed to take that first step.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Now, I'm just a little bit closer to becoming a more reliable person, like you, or the student council president.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Oh, that's right! I still need to thank the president.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}...Um, do you think you could wait for me at the school gate?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After waiting, I headed home with Chihiro.[n]{f 1 1}
